keyPoints: In order to find the 25th and 75th percentiles, arrange the data in ascending order and look for the skeleton at the 25th and 75th positions.
The 25th percentile is also known as the first quartile (Q1), and the 75th percentile is called the third quartile (Q3).
The interquartile range (IQR) is calculated by subtracting the 25th percentile from the 75th percentile: IQR = Q3 - Q1.
